8441","book_info":{"abstract":"震惊，京都大学图书官员竟然呗大一校花堵门叫爸爸，这究竟是人性的扭曲还是道德的沦丧？
金秋九月，大一新生刚入学不久，一则帖子突然火爆京都大学的校园论坛。
作为当事人之一的李承渊一脸懵逼，这竟然不是恶作剧，这个突然找上门来的清纯校花，居然真是自己闺女，亲的！
而且……自己还有一个儿子在隔壁的京都理工？
于是乎，人到中年的李承渊开启了原本想养娃，实则被娃养的甜宠日常，并成功激活了最强奶爸系统，只要做好一名奶爸，就能得到各种系统奖励……
投喂闺女一杯奶茶奖励两百块，被闺女投喂爱心早餐奖励一千？啊这……
对了，还有孩子他妈，据说是个高冷禁欲系成熟御姐？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9884ccd97087dd723eae86502ba41de6","author":"少年派大星星","author_id":"","book_id":"7356505437723708441","book_name":"人到中年：开局清纯校花堵门叫爸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2906人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7356505624185668121","read_count":"2906","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"276674"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"137","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,奶爸,校花,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o4c8ae5efdaef93f27f21e9ad00775ff0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779397057&x-signature=A7NqZE4BQkZ2bkbwpDlBJ4YBh8M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2494126365617757","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"23"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032304573738969D6E2A55CEF93BCB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_durat
